envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Seat tiers describe what a single user-level entitlement costs and what it includes. Every seat — including the cheapest — carries DMW baseline + governance discipline. Suggested internal price ranges are anchors; final public pricing is product-team-decided and not a contractual claim from this catalog.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Seats entitle availability per user. They never authorize cross-tenant access, manager surveillance, employee scoring, or sensitive-attribute inference. Per-user permissions are still governed by Foundation governance.

items.name: Standard Digital Twin Seat
items.description: Default per-user seat. Standard Digital Twin capabilities + baseline DMW + Foundation safety + audit baseline.
items.human_readable_summary: Standard Digital Twin Seat. Suggested internal $25-$49/user/month. DMW baseline included. Foundation safety + audit baseline preserved.
items.model_usage_notes: Standard seats can use Twin capabilities within their role scope. They do not auto-acquire connector activation, workflow execution authority, or admin-tier privileges.
items.governance_notes: Standard seats operate under read-first defaults; write actions are delegated, not implicit. Twin operates inside DMW scope. No employee scoring, no manager surveillance, no psychological profiling.
items.billing_notes: seat_id: standard-twin. Suggested internal: $25-$49/user/month anchor. Final public pricing product-team-decided.
items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. Standard remains the safe minimum.

items.name: Professional Digital Twin Seat
items.description: Professional-grade Twin seat for users in higher-leverage roles (PM/EM/Senior IC/CSM/AE). Adds richer capability access within governance.
items.human_readable_summary: Professional Digital Twin Seat. Suggested internal $75-$125/user/month. Richer capability access within governance. DMW baseline included.
items.model_usage_notes: Professional seats can engage with more capability packs once entitled. Activation still requires Foundation governance + map-region approval.
items.governance_notes: Professional seats remain under delegated-authority discipline. Increased availability does not relax governance.
items.billing_notes: seat_id: professional-twin. Suggested internal: $75-$125/user/month anchor. Final public pricing product-team-decided.
items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. May downgrade to standard-twin; safety + DMW preserved.

items.name: Executive / High-Authority Twin Seat
items.description: Executive-tier Twin seat. Higher delegation ceiling under explicit Founder/CEO/CXO authority. Still bounded by Foundation governance + DMW scope.
items.human_readable_summary: Executive / High-Authority Twin Seat. Suggested internal $150-$300/user/month. Higher delegation ceiling under explicit authority. DMW baseline included.
items.model_usage_notes: Executive seats can have broader delegated authority profiles per ADR-0080. The Twin is a scoped extension of the human — never above the human, never an uncontrolled actor.
items.governance_notes: Executive Twin scope parity per ADR-0052: same RBAC/ABAC boundary as the human, same tenant boundaries, same escalation limits. Higher authority never bypasses Foundation governance.
items.billing_notes: seat_id: executive-twin. Suggested internal: $150-$300/user/month anchor. Final public pricing product-team-decided.
items.upgrade_path: executive-twin (terminal at user tier; may co-exist with Admin seat for combined roles)
items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. Authority profile downgraded gracefully; audit + DMW preserved.

items.name: Otzar Administrator Seat
items.description: First-class Otzar Administrator seat per ADR-0080 Amendment 5. Admin Twin is the first Domain General Intelligence champion. Governs Dandelion approvals, capability pack activation, connector activation, workflow promotion, billing review.
items.human_readable_summary: Otzar Administrator Seat. Suggested internal $99-$199/admin/month. Admin Twin = first DGI champion. Activates the org's governed surface; never bypasses governance.
items.model_usage_notes: Admin seats reference Admin Twin guidance per ADR-0080 Amendment 5. Admin Twin coordinates map-aware synthesis (per ADR-0082 Amendment 1) and never autonomously activates.
items.governance_notes: Admin seats trigger governance — they do not override it. Dual-control still applies for risky writes. Admin Twin is map-aware but never autonomous.
items.billing_notes: seat_id: otzar-administrator. Suggested internal: $99-$199/admin/month anchor. Final public pricing product-team-decided.
audit_expectations: future B3+ runtime preserves all ADMIN_ACTION emissions
items.upgrade_path: otzar-administrator (co-exists with executive-twin in combined roles)
items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. Admin seat removal preserves audit + DMW + same-org boundary.

items.name: Board / Observer Seat
items.description: Read-only observer seat for board members + observers. Bounded read-only surface; never grants write authority.
items.human_readable_summary: Board / Observer Seat. Suggested internal $49-$149/user/month. Read-only governed surfaces only. DMW baseline included.
items.model_usage_notes: Observer seats consume governed read-only views (executive briefings, governance dashboards). They never write, activate, or approve.
items.governance_notes: Board seats are read-only by construction. Confidential or sensitive content remains scoped per Foundation governance.
items.billing_notes: seat_id: board-observer. Suggested internal: $49-$149/user/month anchor. Final public pricing product-team-decided.
items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. Read-only removal preserves audit + retention.

items.name: External Collaborator / Limited Seat
items.description: Limited external collaborator seat (vendor, contractor, advisor). Tightly scoped per-engagement; never broad-tenant access.
items.human_readable_summary: External Collaborator / Limited Seat. Custom / limited pricing. Tightly scoped per engagement. DMW baseline included for scope safety.
items.model_usage_notes: External seats are bound per engagement. They never see other engagements, other tenants, or org-wide content.
items.governance_notes: External collaborators operate strictly inside scoped engagement boundary. Cross-engagement access is forbidden by construction.
items.billing_notes: seat_id: external-collaborator. Pricing: custom / limited. Final pricing negotiated per engagement.
items.downgrade_behavior: Per docs/entitlement-catalog/downgrade-policies.json. Engagement end preserves audit + lawful retention window.
